title: Testing This Viral ICT Strategy for 30 Days - Results
description: I tested the most viral ICT smart money strategy for 30 days straight. Here's the honest truth about what happened — and why most traders fail before they even start. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT breakdowns.
script: I said three words every day. 'Let me guess.' I thought I understood ICT. I was losing every trade. Blown accounts. Missed entries. No structure. Smart money concepts felt impossible. Nothing was clicking. Then I stopped guessing. I followed ICT order blocks and fair value gaps. Strictly. For 30 days. Week four? Consistent. Funded account reached. The strategy works. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT setups.
